test.create_query: CREATE TABLE narrow_col (w UInt16) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple() SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO narrow_col SELECT number % 50000 FROM numbers(100000000)
test.query: SELECT sum(w), sum(w + 1), sum(w + 2), sum(w + 3), sum(w + 4), sum(w + 5), sum(w + 6), sum(w + 7), sum(w + 8), sum(w + 9) FROM narrow_col FORMAT Null
SELECT sum(w) FROM narrow_col GROUP BY w % 1000 FORMAT Null
